review_summary.college_name: MKM Group of Colleges For Girls Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: It's a decent experience in this college.

content.Placements: They provide placement opportunities on their campus. But they offer a low salary according to the college professor job. But for someone who just needs experience, it is a good opportunity, but someone who is applying for a permanent job should apply somewhere else at a good package.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. Hostel rooms are pretty good, but washroom cleanliness is an issue. Classrooms and libraries provide a good environment for studying. Canteens provide decent food. Sports and events are organised so students can show their talent like archery, cricket, etc.

individual_reviews.title: Very supportive college staff and college management.

content.Placements: The placement process at MKM College was very effective. More than 85 percent of students were placed with the minimum package of 7.5 LPA, which is a good start for freshmen, and a maximum of 10 lacs per annum. According to what the company is offering, every year, many students are placed in various companies.
content.Infrastructure: The college has excellent facilities with all the requirements. Well-maintained laboratories, classrooms, and medical facilities are provided 24 hours a day in colleges and hostels. There is a large, fully computerized library and a normal library. And there is a free Wi-Fi zone.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Excellent academics, and the best college in India.

content.Placements: Our classmates have been selected in many reputed companies with the highest salary package of 9.50 lacs per year and an average salary of 4 lacs per year. The placement committee is also present on campus and secures good placements. Top-notch companies have visited here and hired our students with high packages.
content.Infrastructure: The building of our college is very nicely constructed and fulfills all the necessities of students and teachers. Lecture rooms are well-built, and computer labs and medical laboratories are well-equipped. Auditoriums are properly up-to-date. The college campus's infrastructure is excellent.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The best academic and placement institute in the NCR.

content.Placements: Here, the placements are of extremely good quality. The placement committee is likewise excellent. The highest salary package offered is between 6 and 9 lacs per year. With a maximum placement rate of 80 percent for students from our institute, Many reputed companies are visiting campus.
content.Infrastructure: The college boasts modern infrastructure equipped with state-of-the-art facilities, including spacious classrooms, labs, a vast library with digital resources, and recreational areas for students. With this well-planned infrastructure, the college provides students with an inspiring space to excel in their academics and cultivate a vibrant campus community.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of MKM Group of Colleges For Girls.

content.Placements: Placement cell is very supportive; almost 90 percent students are placed from college campus with a 4 LPA salary package. I am really grateful to MKM for providing us such a great opportunity. Many reputed companies come here for the placement procedure.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our college is very good and comfortable. No one can encounter any problem; big classes are available with proper Wi-Fi connectivity, good library, and labs are also there. Proper medical facility, canteen, and hostel are available there. Taste of food in mess is acceptable.

As for the library a comprehensive collection of books related to literature, linguistics, writing and other areas of English  studies

I would rate 3 out of 5 for food. The mess is not good. We get hot water daily but washrooms are not clean. Canteen facility is good. The dispensary facility is excellent. In the hospital, there are 20 beds and 2 specialised MBBS doctors and they treat us very well. A playground is available for sports like badminton, basketball, and cricket.

reviews_list.review_title: Great opportunities are given to students.

review_content.Placements: The majority of my seniors went for proper internships where they were getting paid. Recruiting companies are Muskurahat Foundation, Project Guru, etc. I'll be currently going for my summer internships, so I would not be the best person to speak on placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: They have well-built classrooms and infrastructure is fine. The quality of food in the canteen is also nice. There are a variety of dishes in canteen like pasta, sandwiches, maggi, coffee, etc. There are four floors in total. There are many departments like psychology, English, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, you can consider the college for undergraduates.

review_content.Placements: Around 90% of the students got placed. The highest package offered is 12 LPA. There are many start-ups for entrepreneurial minds and internships are also available. With some hard work and dedication, you can easily grab an opportunity for both internships and placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are available outside the campus which is owned by the college itself for both boys and girls separately. They are clean and well-managed by the college. Food quality is good and washrooms are also available. You do have options of PG nearby which are also affordable and accessible.

overview_faqs.question: Is Jagannath Community College a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Jagannath Community College is a reputed institute for Certificate, B.Voc, UG Diploma, BBA, BBM/BMS, BCA, M.Sc., B.Sc., B.Des, MBA/PGDM, B.A. (Hons), B.Com, B.FTech, BHM, M.A. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, Banking, Finance & Insurance, Hospitality & Travel, Design, IT & Software, Science, Accounting & Commerce, Engineering, Mass Communication & Media, Humanities & Social Sciences, Architecture & Planning. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Jagannath Community College has a review rating of 3.2 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3 on campuslife, 2.9 on placements, 3.8 on faculty and 3.4 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Jagannath Community College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: The faculty is good, the management could be better, but it's okay otherwise.

content.Placements: They didn't offer placements for fields of psychology except industrial, which I didn't take, so I didn't know much about it. But internships provided by the college were good, valuable, and really knowledgeable, they lasted for over a month, so according to that, it was good.
content.Infrastructure: Labs, library, air-conditioned classes, computer labs, and canteens were available. Washrooms were hygienic too. However, the campus was a bit small, so there was no place to hang out as such, and they didn't let you sit in the garden area or canteens if you had a free lecture. Entry and exit rules were also a bit strict.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for a degree only.

content.Placements: Placements of this college are not so bad or not so good. As a student of this college, I came to know that the placements are not for all the students, and these are for only those who secured a good CGP in exams or the attendance criteria are fulfilled for 75%. No big companies came here. The average package ranges from 3-4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college has quite good infrastructure. There are good and maintained library and computer labs. The college campus has its own 3 canteens, and the lunch facility for hostel students is different. Classes are fully AC and clean. The college has a small area for playing outdoor games.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in English Literature - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great opportunities are given to students.

content.Placements: The majority of my seniors went for proper internships where they were getting paid. Recruiting companies are Muskurahat Foundation, Project Guru, etc. I'll be currently going for my summer internships, so I would not be the best person to speak on placements.
content.Infrastructure: They have well-built classrooms and infrastructure is fine. The quality of food in the canteen is also nice. There are a variety of dishes in canteen like pasta, sandwiches, maggi, coffee, etc. There are four floors in total. There are many departments like psychology, English, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overall, you can consider the college for undergraduates.

content.Placements: Around 90% of the students got placed. The highest package offered is 12 LPA. There are many start-ups for entrepreneurial minds and internships are also available. With some hard work and dedication, you can easily grab an opportunity for both internships and placements.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are available outside the campus which is owned by the college itself for both boys and girls separately. They are clean and well-managed by the college. Food quality is good and washrooms are also available. You do have options of PG nearby which are also affordable and accessible.

individual_reviews.title: Good college and good facility.

content.Placements: So basically, this college provides internships and also placements for sales and marketing, and they also provide financing jobs, but they don't provide good packages. The lowest package will be up to 2.50 Lacs and the highest 6 to 8,00,000. HR jobs provided by the college are the best.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is very advanced, and talking about the hostel, it is one of the best private hostels. Yes, it is expensive, but the facilities provided by them are amazing, like good food, Wi-Fi, washrooms, and cleanliness.

reviews.review_heading: Great college. However one needs to put extra efforts in order to get great opportunities.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is great to study. However, the campus is small as compared to other universities. 
The facilities in the hostel are great but those are a little bit far from the campus.
You get food token from hostel for the time you are in college.
There are opportunities to play any sport on the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good and well.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good and well-behaved. There are ACs, clocks, proper desks and benches for students, and water coolers. The canteen is not too good, and the quality is bad in taste. The college has parking and sports areas. The college has different rooms like the library, green screens, and others, which are specifically for practicing and improving in their courses.

reviews.review_heading: Jagannath community College review.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms have AC's and projectors for better study. The Wi-Fi is easily accessible. The labs and library are good. The new canteen in the college has good food, and the college promotes sports like cricket, basketball, volleyball, etc. There's an annual sports day too.

reviews.review_heading: Life of a Student at Jagannath Community College .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is 8/10 of the college, as there is a library open until the college is open and various amounts of notes, books, and previous year questions are available there. As a computer course student, I am always available to practice after the lectures.

reviews.review_heading: JCC - is it Worth or NOT.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are fully air conditioned as a student of BCA we get access to lab library and internet connection within the lab and the library. The classrooms are modernised with projectors and LCD is installed in every classroom. The hostel is not official recognised by the JCC. It has a Collaboration with multiple PG situated in Rohini itself, the hostels equipped with air cooler and a normal chair table and a B.Ed. The food quality in the canteen is good. We have basically three cantee...

reviews.review_heading: BBA | Nice Faculty | Jagannath Community College
reviews.review_text: The college campus is provided with sports grounds for different sports. The classrooms are well-maintained. The main building requires maintenance. The campus is connected to DTC bus and DMRC metro routes. Some of the classrooms lack smart boards and projectors.

reviews.review_heading: Jagannath Community College, Rohini.
reviews.review_text: The college is well connected through bus and metro routes. The college has sports facilities for volleyball, basketball etc. The classrooms are maintained. Few of them are equipped with smart boards and projectors. The infrastructure of the college is above average.

reviews.review_heading: Jagannath Community College, Rohini.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great. Various activities and sports events are held every year. The last year’s fest was hosted by B Praak. The campus life is quite good here. Students actively take part in different competitions and club activities. There are adequate facilities for sports as well.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jagannath Community College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college as a whole is not that great; however, classrooms and the library are quite good. The college has lifts, but only teachers can use them, and the students have to use stairs. There are limited food options available in the canteen, and the quality of the food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jagannath Community College.
reviews.review_text: Best in infrastructure. In the college, there is one Nescafe stall, one restaurant-type canteen, and one open canteen. There is also one stall of cholle kulche available. In every classroom, there is one AC, 2 fans, 2 lights, one projector, and the best chairs for the students. The food quality of the canteen is very tasty, and they provide the best quality food.

reviews_list.review_title: It's is good college but management is worst as they do not understand students' problems.

review_summary.college_name: Raos College Of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: Review of Raos College Of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: Placements are not good. Around 60% of students got placed in this course. The average salary package offered was 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are KIMS, etc. Internships are also offered in this course. The top roles offered are assistant doctor, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very good. The infrastructure is great. Free Wi-Fi is enabled. Laboratories are well-equipped. Classrooms are well-maintained. There is a huge library on our campus. Hostel facilities are great. The food quality is decent. Medical facilities are also available. A playground is not available. Sports are not encouraged in this college.

individual_reviews.title: It's is good college but management is worst as they do not understand students' problems.

content.Placements: Sometimes campus placement is good for students letting them get placed in companies with good salaries. 40 percent of the students got placement. Most of the campus selections are only for the jobs of Medical Coding. The faculty is very supportive of students. HCl and AGS health are the major hiring companies.
content.Infrastructure: A library is available here and hostel facility is awesome. A canteen is also there. Sometimes, hostel food is not good enough and management is the worst. Wi-Fi facility is available here with good classrooms and labs.

individual_reviews.title: The college is absolutely good, and I am satisfied with faculty.

content.Placements: In our college, 80% of students got placements. Many companies and hospitals offer placements. The highest package offered is 10 LPA, and the lowest package is 5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Bioclinics, Accenture etc. 80% of students got internships in bioclincs and various hospitals. The top role offered in my course was pharmacovigilance.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, the facilities are very good, and the infrastructure is good. A lot of books are available in our library. Hostel rooms and caretakers are good, and the food is good. Medical checkups are available in the hostel. Sports and games are available in our college.

individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure here.

content.Placements: Maximum number of students got placements in Pharma companies of their talent. No roles will be offered in this college. Maximum 100-150 students were placed in this course. SRK Pharma was top company that was hiring. Job roles will be offered based on percentage and interview.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms were average. But the facility was good. Canteen food was not that much good. Overall, hostel was also not that much good. We could not use heaters, iron box, and water was also not good. Good laboratories and computer labs were available. Hostel beds were good.

reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was available for every department. The labs had good quality tools and notes. The teachers were very good and helped us at every moment in performing practicals. Each department had its own classroom and smart room. The library had almost 100 percent of the course-related books.

reviews.review_heading: Among the things I liked about the college were a great learning environment and friendships.
reviews.review_text: When I was studying, there were no Wi-Fi facilities in the college except in offices and the Computer Science department. The college has a beautiful library with a facility of a separate study room. Books ranging from foreign to the country's famous authors are available. The classrooms are under CCTV surveillance.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. Wi-Fi is available in our college. All classrooms are excellent. The library has many books. There is no hostel in our college, so students can stay in PGs. Our college has a playground. We can play many sports like football, etc., in the playground.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mangaldai College.
reviews.review_text: There is an IT lab in our college. Many free Wi-Fi connections are available on our campus. You can use them for your study. Students are very supportive. Our college has a canteen. A shop is available inside our campus. The campus is spread over 34 acres of land. Our college has a huge field where many sports events are organised.

reviews.review_heading: Mangaldai college, a college for Bachelors degree in arts, Science, and vocational studies.
reviews.review_text: Talking about infrastructure, there is a good environment. The departments well-equipped buildings with everything required to study. But they don't have Wi-Fi. The rooms are clean. There are 3 toilets,  1 for girls,  2 for boys. There are lot of trees in campus. There is huge playground. Teachers are top class. They are highly educated. Specially my department which is botany, there are 7 faculty members, all are very meritorious and promising, solving every doubt of the students and helping us...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mangaldai College.
reviews.review_text: This college provides the best electricity, water supply, and teaching facilities. The food served in the canteen was good. It provides laundry room and washroom was good. It also provides a good auditorium hall, gym, and a very big playground where students can play football, badminton, etc

reviews.review_heading: It's a nice college with good teachers, a good building and good lab facilities.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were very nice here with blackboard, table and benches to sit. The lab room was very good with all types of instruments, i.e., complete blood count cell and semi-auto biochemistry analyser. There were no hostel facilities for boys. The quality of food served was awesome, good and tasty. Medical facilities were not available. There were a playground and all kinds of games.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college infrastructure is the best.
reviews.review_text: Mangaldai College's infrastructure and design are very beautiful and soothing. There is a proper lab with enough equipment, and the library has full of course-related books, journals, and research books. But there is only a negative thing that is Wi-Fi is not available here. Hostel facilities are above average, and the food quality is good. The canteen food is healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Mangaldai college is a good choice for OBC category student. And has free admission also.
reviews.review_text: The facilities of mangaldai college hostel is excellent. The girls hostel needs improvement. There are Wi-Fi facilities in college campus. The laboratory room quiet good and clean. And the laboratory room is safe for student and teacher experiment. Classrooms and the library needs  improvement.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for Bachelor degree courses.
reviews.review_text: Our college doesn't have a boys hostel but a girls hostel is provided. Hostel facilities are good. The quality of food available in mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities and sports are good.
